---
lang: en
params:
  # Path to a JSON reference dataset (admin-uploaded). When set, the report
  # renders the stored dataset; ad-hoc live-fetch filter parameters are
  # not used in this mode.
  # @type character
  referenceDataFile: NULL

  # Start of the reporting period (inclusive).
  # @type Date
  reportingPeriodFrom: NULL

  # End of the reporting period (inclusive).
  # @type Date
  reportingPeriodTo: NULL

  # Lower bound (inclusive) of the birth-weight filter, in grams.
  # @type integer
  # @range 0..65535
  birthWeightFrom: NULL

  # Upper bound (inclusive) of the birth-weight filter, in grams.
  # @type integer
  # @range 0..65535
  birthWeightTo: NULL

  # Lower bound (inclusive) of the gestational-age filter, in weeks.
  # @type integer
  # @range 0..52
  gestationWeeksFrom: NULL

  # Upper bound (inclusive) of the gestational-age filter, in weeks.
  # @type integer
  # @range 0..52
  gestationWeeksTo: NULL

  # ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country codes to include.
  # @type character[]
  reportingCountries: NULL

  # Hospital codes (NeoIPC site codes) to include.
  # @type character[]
  hospitalFilter: NULL

  # Apply the test-unit filter.
  # @type logical
  testUnitFilter: true

  # Apply the default patient filter.
  # @type logical
  defaultPatientFilter: true

  # Path to a validation-exception file (admin-uploaded) used to suppress
  # specific known false-positive validation findings during this render.
  # @type character
  validationExceptionFile: NULL

  # DHIS2 endpoint scheme (http or https). Server-side override; not
  # exposed via the public API.
  # @type character
  # @values [http, https]
  dhis2Scheme: NULL

  # DHIS2 endpoint hostname. Server-side override; not exposed via the
  # public API.
  # @type character
  dhis2Hostname: NULL

  # DHIS2 endpoint TCP port. Server-side override; not exposed via the
  # public API.
  # @type integer
  # @range 1..65535
  dhis2Port: NULL

  # DHIS2 API path prefix. Server-side override; not exposed via the
  # public API.
  # @type character
  dhis2Path: NULL

  # Threshold for sparse-data handling.
  # @type integer
  # @range 1..
  sparseDataThreshold: 16

  # Confidence-interval display mode.
  # @type character
  # @values [all, rate, none]
  includeConfidenceIntervals: "all"

  # Include report-section introduction texts.
  # @type logical
  includeIntroductionTexts: true

  # Include report-section methods texts.
  # @type logical
  includeMethodsTexts: true

  # Include the birth-weight distribution figure.
  # @type logical
  includeBirthWeightFigure: true

  # Include the gestational-age distribution figure.
  # @type logical
  includeGestationalAgeFigure: true

  # Include the incidence-density table.
  # @type logical
  includeIncidenceDensityTable: true

  # Include the device-associated incidence-density table.
  # @type logical
  includeDeviceAssociatedIncidenceDensityTable: true

  # Include the agent-per-infection rate table.
  # @type logical
  includeAgentPerInfectionRateTable: true

  # Include the resistant-pathogen-infection rate table.
  # @type logical
  includeResistantPathogenInfectionRateTable: false

  # Include the organism-resistance rate table.
  # @type logical
  includeOrganismResistanceRateTable: false

  # Include the infectious-agent-detection rate table.
  # @type logical
  includeInfectiousAgentDetectionRateTable: true

  # Include the antibiotic-resistance-test rate table.
  # @type logical
  includeAntibioticResistanceTestRateTable: false

  # Include the risk-density rate table.
  # @type logical
  includeRiskDensityRateTable: true

  # Include the antibiotic-utilisation table.
  # @type logical
  includeAntibioticUtilisationTable: false

  # Include the surgical-procedure rate table.
  # @type logical
  includeSurgicalProcedureRateTable: true

  # Include the secondary-BSI rate table.
  # @type logical
  includeSecondaryBsiRateTable: false
---

```{r}
#| label: Make sure the locale is initialised correctly
Sys.setenv(LC_ALL = "en_GB.UTF-8")
```

{{< include _content.qmd >}}
